test_cases:
[
  {
    "testCaseId": "TC_UE_DETACH_001",
    "title": "Positive Test: UE-Initiated Detach Request with Switch Off via E-UTRAN",
    "description": "Verify that when UE sends a NAS Detach Request message with Switch Off parameter set to true while camping on E-UTRAN, the MME correctly processes the detach and releases the S1 connection.",
    "preconditions": [
      "UE is camped on E-UTRAN in ECM-IDLE or ECM-CONNECTED state",
      "UE has a valid GUTI and active registration",
      "UE is connected to an eNodeB capable of forwarding NAS messages"
    ],
    "testSteps": [
      "Access the 5G management interface by connecting via `SSH admin@<IP>` and authenticate with appropriate credentials.",
      "Ensure UE initiates a NAS Detach Request message with parameters (GUTI, Switch Off = true) sent via eNodeB including TAI+ECGI.",
      "Verify that the eNodeB forwards the NAS Detach Request to the MME with PSCell ID if Dual Connectivity is active.",
      "Observe that the MME processes the Detach Request and initiates the detach procedure.",
      "Verify that the MME releases the S1-MME signalling connection by sending S1 Release Command with Cause set to Detach to the eNodeB.",
      "Confirm that the eNodeB completes the S1 Release procedure by sending S1 UE Context Release Complete message."
    ],
    "expectedResults": [
      "MME accepts the Detach Request and acknowledges UE detach.",
      "S1 signalling connection is released correctly without errors.",
      "No further PDN bearer deactivation is required if no active PDN connections.",
      "Dual Connectivity PSCell ID included in messages if applicable."
    ],
    "postconditions": [
      "UE context is removed from MME and eNodeB.",
      "UE moves to detached state.",
      "S1 connection is released completely."
    ],
    "commandsUsed": [
      "SSH admin@<IP>"
    ],
    "verificationMethods": [
      "Capture and analyze NAS Detach Request and Detach Accept messages.",
      "Verify S1 Release Command and UE Context Release Complete messages in MME and eNodeB logs.",
      "Check MME context for UE removal."
    ],
    "category": "Positive Testing"
  },
  {
    "testCaseId": "TC_UE_DETACH_002",
    "title": "Negative Test: UE-Initiated Detach Request via Unauthorized CSG Cell",
    "description": "Verify that when UE sends a Detach Request via a CSG cell where the CSG subscription is absent or expired and the Switch Off parameter indicates detach is not due to switch off, the MME triggers an MME-initiated detach procedure.",
    "preconditions": [
      "UE camps on a CSG cell with absent or expired CSG subscription for that CSG ID and PLMN.",
      "UE sends Detach Request with Switch Off = false."
    ],
    "testSteps": [
      "Connect to the 5G management interface using `SSH admin@<IP>`.",
      "Simulate UE sending NAS Detach Request message via the unauthorized CSG cell with Switch Off parameter set to false.",
      "Verify that the eNodeB forwards the Detach Request to the MME with TAI+ECGI.",
      "Observe that the MME triggers MME-initiated Detach procedure as per clause 5.3.8.3.",
      "Verify that the MME sends a Detach Request message to UE with cause indicating UE is not allowed to access this CSG.",
      "Confirm that the UE removes the unauthorized CSG ID and associated PLMN from its Allowed CSG list.",
      "Confirm that MME releases the S1 connection after Detach Accept is received."
    ],
    "expectedResults": [
      "MME detects unauthorized CSG access and triggers MME-initiated detach.",
      "UE receives Detach Request with appropriate cause.",
      "UE removes unauthorized CSG ID and PLMN from Allowed CSG list.",
      "S1 signalling connection is released properly."
    ],
    "postconditions": [
      "UE is detached and not allowed to access unauthorized CSG cell.",
      "MME context reflects UE detachment.",
      "CSG subscription data is updated accordingly."
    ],
    "commandsUsed": [
      "SSH admin@<IP>"
    ],
    "verificationMethods": [
      "Analyze NAS messages exchanged between UE and MME.",
      "Check MME logs for triggering of MME-initiated detach.",
      "Confirm UE CSG subscription update via network logs or UE logs.",
      "Verify S1 Release procedure completion."
    ],
    "category": "Negative Testing"
  },
  {
    "testCaseId": "TC_UE_DETACH_003",
    "title": "Edge Case Test: UE-Initiated Detach with No Active PDN Connections",
    "description": "Verify the detach procedure behavior when the UE sends a Detach Request but has no activated PDN connections.",
    "preconditions": [
      "UE is camped on E-UTRAN and sends Detach Request.",
      "UE has no active PDN connections."
    ],
    "testSteps": [
      "Connect to the 5G system via `SSH admin@<IP>`.",
      "Simulate UE sending NAS Detach Request with no active PDN connections.",
      "Verify that the MME does not execute steps 2 to 10 related to bearer deactivation.",
      "If configured, verify that MME waits for step 11 and performs step 12 (S1 release).",
      "Verify that for any PDN connection to SCEF, MME indicates PDN connection no longer available.",
      "Confirm MME sends S1 Release Command to eNodeB after Detach Accept."
    ],
    "expectedResults": [
      "Bearer deactivation steps 2 to 10 are skipped.",
      "S1 signalling connection is released correctly.",
      "No Delete Session Requests are sent to Serving GW or PDN GW.",
      "Procedure completes without errors."
    ],
    "postconditions": [
      "UE context is cleared from MME and eNodeB.",
      "UE is detached with no active PDN connections.",
      "Network resources related to UE are released appropriately."
    ],
    "commandsUsed": [
      "SSH admin@<IP>"
    ],
    "verificationMethods": [
      "Check MME logs for absence of Delete Session Request messages.",
      "Verify S1 Release Command and UE Context Release Complete messages.",
      "Validate no bearer context changes in Serving GW and PDN GW."
    ],
    "category": "Edge Cases"
  },
  {
    "testCaseId": "TC_UE_DETACH_004",
    "title": "Performance Test: MME Handling of Multiple Concurrent UE Detach Requests",
    "description": "Evaluate MME performance and resource management when multiple UEs simultaneously initiate detach procedures.",
    "preconditions": [
      "Multiple UEs are camped on E-UTRAN and registered to the same MME.",
      "Each UE has one or more active PDN connections."
    ],
    "testSteps": [
      "Access 5G management interface via `SSH admin@<IP>`.",
      "Simultaneously trigger NAS Detach Request messages from multiple UEs with valid parameters.",
      "Monitor MME CPU, memory, and signalling load during detach processing.",
      "Verify that MME correctly processes detach requests without dropping or delaying any.",
      "Confirm that all S1 Release procedures complete successfully for all UEs.",
      "Check that all Delete Session Requests are properly sent to Serving GW and PDN GW per UE."
    ],
    "expectedResults": [
      "MME processes all detach requests within acceptable latency bounds.",
      "No loss or corruption of signalling messages.",
      "Resources for all UEs are released properly.",
      "No impact on unrelated UEs or network services."
    ],
    "postconditions": [
      "All UEs are successfully detached.",
      "MME resource usage returns to normal after processing.",
      "System remains stable and responsive."
    ],
    "commandsUsed": [
      "SSH admin@<IP>"
    ],
    "verificationMethods": [
      "Monitor MME system metrics during test.",
      "Log analysis for signalling message counts and errors.",
      "Check Serving GW and PDN GW session deletions.",
      "Validate timing and order of procedure completion per UE."
    ],
    "category": "Performance Testing"
  },
  {
    "testCaseId": "TC_UE_DETACH_005",
    "title": "Security Test: Verify Security Procedures Invocation on NAS Detach Request",
    "description": "Verify that security procedures are invoked when NAS Detach Request is used to establish S1 connection, except for emergency or RLOS attached UEs not authenticated.",
    "preconditions": [
      "UE is in ECM-IDLE mode and sends NAS Detach Request to establish S1 connection.",
      "UE is not emergency attached or RLOS attached without authentication."
    ],
    "testSteps": [
      "Use `SSH admin@<IP>` to access the MME configuration and monitoring interface.",
      "Simulate UE sending NAS Detach Request triggering S1 connection establishment.",
      "Monitor MME for invocation of security procedures (authentication, integrity protection).",
      "Repeat test with UE emergency attached or RLOS attached not authenticated.",
